static_prototype_gate.purpose: Allow static planning, fixture, local read-only shell, mock consumer fixture, and validation evidence only.
static_prototype_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Does not activate customer-facing, live runtime, mutation, integration, credential, scheduler, notification, production, or execution capability.

customer_facing_readiness_gate.purpose: Evaluate customer-facing preview readiness in a future phase.
customer_facing_readiness_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate customer-facing readiness.

live_read_only_runtime_gate.purpose: Evaluate live read-only runtime readiness in a future phase.
live_read_only_runtime_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate live read-only runtime.

runtime_mutation_gate.purpose: Evaluate runtime mutation readiness in a future phase.
runtime_mutation_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate runtime mutation.

external_integration_gate.purpose: Evaluate external integration readiness in a future phase.
external_integration_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate external integration.

trading_execution_gate.purpose: Evaluate execution-capable runtime readiness in a future phase.
trading_execution_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate trading execution.

credential_handling_gate.purpose: Evaluate credential handling readiness in a future phase.
credential_handling_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate credential handling.

notification_scheduler_gate.purpose: Evaluate scheduler and notification dispatcher readiness in a future phase.
notification_scheduler_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate scheduling or notification dispatch.

production_deployment_gate.purpose: Evaluate production deployment readiness in a future phase.
production_deployment_gate.explicit_non_activation_statement: Phase 9.4 does not activate production deployment.

non_activation_rules: Static evidence readiness does not imply customer-facing readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not imply live runtime readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not imply execution readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not imply trading automation readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not imply broker/Binance connectivity.
Static evidence readiness does not imply credential handling readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not imply scheduler or notification dispatcher readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not imply production deployment readiness.
Static evidence readiness does not mutate trading facts, portfolio state, account state, cash state, or execution ledger state.
Static evidence readiness may only be used as planning, fixture, static shell, and validation evidence.
required_conditions: All non-static future gates remain not_activated.
All non-static future gates keep current_phase_allowed false.
All non-static future gates keep activation_requested false.
All non-static future gates keep activation_granted false.
Trading facts, portfolio state, execution ledger state, cash state, broker connection, and Binance connection remain unchanged.

separation_rules: TWOS runtime/product SoT must never override LDD trading/execution SoT.
LDD trading/execution SoT must never override TWOS runtime/product SoT.
Static evidence packs and future gate checklists must never mutate trading facts, portfolio state, execution ledger state, account state, or cash state.
